item.title: Hegseth considering severe penalty on Anthropic as negotiations stall
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reportedly is close to putting Claude maker Anthropic on a “supply chain risk” list that would be a devastating blow to...

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “My will states that my daughter will receive a fairly large portion of my estate.”

item.title: The smart way to use AI to do your taxes
item.description: Plus: the truth behind how the ‘G-Wagon write off’ really works

item.title: ‘Am I crazy?’ My boyfriend’s parents say he shouldn’t marry me until he earns $50K a year. Who is to blame here?
item.description: “Am I crazy, or are these ‘real’ concerns from his parents?”

item.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
item.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”
